data.title: Write RED/UPDATE tests for inline trap consolidation in hook libs and top-level hooks
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

## What
Create tests/hooks/test-hook-inline-trap-consolidation.sh covering:
1. Each migrated lib function (pre-bash-functions.sh, pre-all-functions.sh, session-misc-functions.sh) writes JSONL to new path on ERR
2. run-hook.sh writes to ~/.claude/logs/dso-hook-errors.jsonl (not legacy path)
3. Top-level hooks that had inline traps now write to new path

## File Impact
| Action | File |
|--------|------|
| CREATE | tests/hooks/test-hook-inline-trap-consolidation.sh |
| MODIFY | .test-index |

## Tests to Add
1. test_pre_bash_functions_err_writes_new_path — call a function from pre-bash-functions.sh that has a migrated trap, inject ERR, assert new path log entry written
2. test_session_misc_functions_err_writes_new_path — same for session-misc-functions.sh functions
3. test_run_hook_uses_new_log_path — run run-hook.sh with a deliberate failure, assert entry in new path (not legacy)
4. test_no_legacy_path_in_migrated_libs — grep check: none of the migrated files contain HOOK_ERROR_LOG pointing to legacy path
5. test_review_gate_bypass_sentinel_enforcement_intact — verify trap - ERR; return 2 still fires in review-gate-bypass-sentinel.sh (enforcement not broken by migration)

## Note on post-functions.sh:
Post-functions.sh uses 'trap return 0 ERR' (function-scope). Add:
6. test_post_functions_err_still_returns_0 — verify that after migration, a crash in a post-function still causes return 0 from the function (not process exit)

## .test-index
Add RED marker for each new lib path being migrated.
